title: The Rhinoceros Woodcut by Albrecht Dürer
short_description: A restored public-domain woodcut featuring The Rhinoceros, refined for strong contrast and wearable impact on apparel.
long_description: The Rhinoceros is adapted from a public-domain woodcut by Albrecht Dürer (unknown). The original historical linework is preserved while being prepared for bold, high-contrast printing on shirts and other products.
tags: the rhinoceros, woodcut, albrecht dürer, wikimedia commons, public domain
